knowledge_hooks.hook: Use Mr Fish when a Malaysia F&B group is expanding outlets; HQ visibility over attendance/payroll becomes a growth enabler.
knowledge_hooks.pain: Opening new outlets made attendance, manpower visibility, and payroll calculation harder to control.
knowledge_hooks.outcome: StaffAny facilitated attendance-to-payroll flow and helped HQ see who was working across outlets.
knowledge_hooks.best_fit_prospect_pattern: MY multi-outlet F&B groups with expansion, attendance accuracy, payroll speed, or HQ visibility needs.
